title: AI-assisted problem solving in CodeGrind
summary: Showcase CodeGrind's AI-assisted problem solving and real-time guidance as users tackle a challenge with the Azure OpenAI integration.
core_message: CodeGrind combines LeetCode-style challenges with an AI assistant to guide you through solving problems in real-time, showcasing problem-solving flow from prompt to solution.
cta: Try a practice problem with AI help now
visual_brief: A short demo style video: split-screen showing the CodeGrind editor on one side with a LeetCode-style problem prompt, and the AI assistant panel providing hints and code suggestions; subtle cyberpunk UI touches and real-time code updates.

media.selection_reason: No public blob assets were available, so the workflow will generate a review image from the brief.
